# SPECIFICATION INVENTORY

## Entry Template

## Entry: <spec_id>
- created_at: <UTC ISO-8601>
- specification_file: <path>
- source_data_entries:
  - <item_id>
- reviewer_role: <expert-role>
- review_outcome: <helpful|mixed|insufficient>
- recommendation_summary: <short summary>
- considered_for_planning: <yes|no>
- planning_impact: <none|candidate|scheduled>
